displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #34: Mandatory Retirement, Part 3
synopsis: The Rogues stage a dangerous rescue of Sate Pestage. Now is their chance to undermine Ysanne Isard, who has her own designs on the Imperial throne. But a power struggle in the Empire's highest circles has Isard cornered, and that's when the Imperial Intelligence Chief is most dangerous!
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #34: Mandatory Retirement, Part 3
